name: Suspicion
description: A 3d6 biography table of rumor, unease, scrutiny, and doubtful reputation.

results.description: People speak of you as if you have already done something unforgivable.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: A dark rumor clings to your name and resists correction.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: Someone in authority has reason to keep an eye on you.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: You are remembered as having been near something troubling.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: Trust comes slowly where your name is known.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: Some people find you difficult to place and therefore difficult to trust.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: An old association still colors how others judge you.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: Nothing concrete is held against you, but doubt gathers easily around you.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: You have learned how quickly innocence can sound rehearsed.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: A harmless peculiarity has been mistaken for something worse.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: Those who know you well defend you; others hesitate.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: You were once suspected unfairly, and the memory remains.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: You know what it is to be watched more closely than others.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: Your name has passed through uneasy conversations behind closed doors.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: A serious accusation nearly fixed itself to your life.
results.name: suspicion

results.description: You escaped condemnation, but many still wonder whether they were wrong to let you go.
results.name: suspicion
